ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2009, 2010) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "game_number" INTEGER /* Game number in the season */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (e.g., city, arena) */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game (e.g., clear, snowing) */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., completed, postponed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team (e.g., NYR, TBL) */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "captain" TEXT /* Name of the team captain */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., forward, defenseman, goalie) */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height (e.g., 5'10") */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "player_game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-game association */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player in the game */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Number of penalty minutes for the player in the game */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating */,
  "time_on_ice" TEXT /* Total time on ice (e.g., 18:32) */,
  "faceoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of faceoff wins */,
  "faceoff_losses" INTEGER /* Number of faceoff losses */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "blocked_shots" INTEGER /* Number of blocked shots */,
  "giveaways" INTEGER /* Number of giveaways */,
  "takeaways" INTEGER /* Number of takeaways */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal */,
  "power_play_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored during power play */,
  "power_play_assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists during power play */,
  "short_handed_goals" INTEGER /* Number of short-handed goals */,
  "short_handed_assists" INTEGER /* Number of short-handed assists */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, analyst, team staff) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
